vulnerability.reference: Objective functions optimize for easily measurable outcomes, neglecting critical but hard-to-quantify maternal needs.
vulnerability.generated: Mothers rely on AI-scheduled calls without alternative access to counseling, making them defenseless against resource misallocation.

impact.reference: Preventable maternal and neonatal complications from missed high-risk pregnancies.
impact.generated: High-risk mothers miss critical health counseling, leading to preventable complications and increased maternal and infant morbidity.

dose_response.reference: Biased or high-variance off-policy evaluation estimates enable unreliable policy recommendations, which in public health maternal outreach leads to misallocated health worker calls that miss high-risk pregnancies.
dose_response.generated: Biased off-policy evaluation estimates, through AI-scheduled phone counseling for pregnant and new mothers, trigger defenselessness against resource misallocation, leading to high-risk mothers missing critical counseling and preventable maternal-infant morbidity.
